calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for and with Andrea Leung (Agent/Attorney-in-Fact).

The Court noted that this is petition to remove the matter from under Court supervision and raised the issue of no one other than Mr. Kolomeyer being noticed. Mr. Schultz stated that they have received no opposition, that Mr. Kolomeyer only had his Wife who passed away many years ago and a Daughter who passed away recently. The Court granted the Third Account and Report of Attorney-in-Fact (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Chu. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To May-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Andrea Leung (Agent under Power of Attorney)

Mr. Schultz requested an additional 30 day continuance, stating that his client has been busy with tax season, and was audited by the Social Security Administration for her Conservatees and Trustees, that his client is a professional fiduciary, and has been reminded about submitting this accounting. The status of filing the 3rd accounting is continued to May 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION Petition By Attorney-In-Fact To Bring Durable Power Of Attorney For Finances Under Continuing Court
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Andrea Leung (Power of Attorney for Dr. Kolomeyer).

The Court noted that Mr. Tomioka was not present. Mr. Schultz stated that Mr. Tomioka was involved in the Conservatorship, that Mr. Tomioka did not want to represent Mr. Kolomeyer in this proceeding and that Mr. Kolomeyer was advised of his right to hire Counsel. In addition, Mr. schultz stated that he continued the matter to allow Mr. Kolomeyer to opportunity to hire Counsel if he desired to do so and that he (Mr. Schultz) feels comfortable going forward. The Court granted the Petition by Attrorney-in-Fact to Bring Durable Power Of Attorney for Finances Under Continuing Court Supervision (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $76,000.00 is required. The Court will allow no more than $350.00 per week for allowances. The Attorney-in-Fact will be required to do accountings.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

PETITION Petition By Attorney-In-Fact To Bring Durable Power Of Attorney For Finances Under Continuing Court
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Continued To Dec-03-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
